originalTitle: Energy IPOs surge as investors hunt for ways to play AI boom
summary: Companies coming to market raise money at fastest pace this century, although many stocks perform poorly later
content: Companies coming to market raise money at fastest pace this century, although many stocks perform poorly later
chineseTitle: 随着投资者寻找利用 AI 热潮的方法，能源首次公开募股激增

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
